goal: Clear ghost running/ missions (already in done/) + push status + diagnostics to GitHub
commands: cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && git fetch origin main && git pull --rebase origin main || git reset --hard origin/main
cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge/data/cursor_missions/running && for f in *.json; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; id="${f%.json}"; [ -f ../done/${id}.json ] && rm -f "$f" && echo cleared:$f || true; done
test -f ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge/scripts/mac_bridge.py && curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4150/health >/dev/null && echo bridge_4150=ok || echo bridge_4150=skip
